title: Auto-Executer Script
objective: Automate the implementation of tasks defined in a plan-*.json file by interfacing with OpenCode (via SDK) to execute tasks autonomously within a sandbox, running tests, and committing changes.
lastUpdatedNote: T-01, T-02 completed. CLI infrastructure and task discovery logic implemented.

decisions.rationale: Hybrid approach - OpenCode suggests + pattern matching fallback
Out of scope for v1. Sequential execution only
No automatic rollback. User manages manually
Only .git/ is protected. Path normalized for cross-platform

stories.description: Load and Validate Plan - Script accepts plan JSON file and validates it
Find Next Executable Task - Automatically find next pending task with satisfied dependencies
Execute Task via OpenCode - Send task details to OpenCode for implementation
Run Tests After Implementation - Ask OpenCode for tests and execute them
Fix Failed Implementations - Retry loop with max 10 attempts
Generate and Execute Commit - Create commit message and commit changes
Update Plan State - Update plan JSON after each task completion
Interactive Confirmation - Confirm each task before running in interactive mode
Autonomous Execution - Run all pending tasks without stopping
Select OpenCode Model - Choose model for agent instances

tasks.title: Set up project structure and CLI argument parsing
tasks.whatToDo: Initialize Node.js project structure, set up CLI argument parsing for plan file path, implement JSON validation against schema.json

definitionOfDone.description: Project initialized with TypeScript
CLI accepts plan-*.json path argument
Script validates JSON against schema.json
Script exits with clear error if JSON is invalid or missing
Script prints plan title and task count on success

tasks.title: Implement task discovery logic
tasks.whatToDo: Implement logic to find first task with status 'pending' that has all dependencies satisfied

definitionOfDone.description: Script identifies first task with status: pending
Script verifies all IDs in dependsOn have status: completed or skipped
Script skips tasks with status: skipped or cancelled
Script reports 'No pending tasks' when all are done or blocked

tasks.title: Integrate OpenCode SDK for task execution
tasks.whatToDo: Integrate @opencode-ai/sdk to launch agent instances, implement sandbox constraints, build structured prompts for OpenCode

definitionOfDone.description: OpenCode receives structured prompt with task description, DoD, stories
OpenCode operates within sandbox constraints (no .git/)
OpenCode can create/edit/delete files outside protected paths
OpenCode stops and reports if it cannot complete the task
Script captures OpenCode's final status and any output

tasks.title: Implement execution modes (interactive and autonomous)
tasks.whatToDo: Implement interactive mode with user confirmation prompts and autonomous mode for unattended execution

definitionOfDone.description: Interactive mode pauses before each task and asks for confirmation
User can approve (Y), skip task (s), or abort entire run (a)
Before commit, script asks for confirmation in interactive mode
Autonomous mode processes all pending tasks sequentially without pausing
Progress bar shows current task and overall progress

tasks.title: Build task prompt for OpenCode
tasks.whatToDo: Extract task details (id, whatToDo, stories, size, definitionOfDone, dependsOn) and build structured prompt for OpenCode agent

definitionOfDone.description: Task information extraction implemented
Structured prompt contains all necessary context
Project context and constraints included in prompt

tasks.title: Implement test execution after implementation
tasks.whatToDo: Ask OpenCode to recommend tests, execute recommended commands via shell, capture and report test results

definitionOfDone.description: Script prompts OpenCode for test commands based on the task
Script executes the recommended commands via shell
Script captures stdout/stderr and exit code
Script reports clear pass/fail status for each test

tasks.title: Implement model selection
tasks.whatToDo: Implement model selection at startup, support environment variable default, CLI argument override

definitionOfDone.description: At startup, script presents a list of available models
User can select model interactively or via command-line argument
Default model is configurable via environment variable
Model selection is logged and shown in output

tasks.title: Implement retry loop for failed implementations
tasks.whatToDo: If tests fail, ask OpenCode to fix issues with maximum 10 fix attempts per task

definitionOfDone.description: On test failure, script asks OpenCode to analyze errors and apply fixes
Script re-runs tests after each fix attempt
Script tracks attempt count (1-10)
After 10 failures, script halts with 'BLOCKED' status

tasks.title: Implement error handling and logging
tasks.whatToDo: Implement comprehensive logging to auto-executer.log with timestamps, task ID, operation type, results, duration

definitionOfDone.description: All operations logged with timestamps to auto-executer.log
Log includes task ID, operation type, OpenCode agent output (truncated), result, duration
Summary of all attempts logged for blocked tasks

tasks.title: Implement commit generation and execution
tasks.whatToDo: Ask OpenCode to generate commit message following project conventions, execute git add and git commit

definitionOfDone.description: On test success, script asks OpenCode for a commit message
Commit message references task ID (e.g., T-07) and story IDs (e.g., US-003)
Script runs git add and git commit with the message
Script reports the commit hash after success
Git status is clean after commit

tasks.title: Implement plan state update
tasks.whatToDo: After each successful task, update plan JSON: set task status to completed, record test results and notes, write back to file

definitionOfDone.description: Task status changed to 'completed' after success
definitionOfDone items marked as completed where applicable
Notes field updated with test results and duration
Plan JSON written back to the original file path
